end,{},{},function(r)q[r]=q[r]-(-570478+570479)if 1037287+-1037287==q[r]then q[r],G[r]=nil,nil end end,function(r)local I,z=-345217-(-345218),r[-974267+974268]while z do q[z],I=q[z]-(1039620-1039619),I+(-481283-(-481284))if-830892-(-830892)==q[z]then q[z],G[z]=nil,nil end z=r[I]end end,function(r,I)local m=j(I)local V=function(V,W,D,P,w,G,q)return z(r,{V;W,D;P;w;G;q},I,m)end return V end,function(r,I)local m=j(I)local V=function(...)return z(r,{...},I,m)end return V end return(Z(-502163+4763586,{}))(m(w))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[I(-3429+-38092)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
